title: Bamboo Combat
body:
# Bamboo Combat Adds **Bamboo Weapons** to Minecraft! Currently, the only feature is the bamboo spear. I plan on adding more in future updates. There's also a config file for this mod which you can find in `/.minecraft/config/bamboo_combat.json`. Versions Supported: **1.17.1**, **1.18.2**, **1.19**, **1.19.1**, **1.19.2**, **1.19.4**, **1.20**, **1.20.1**, **1.20.2**, **1.20.6**, and **1.21**. ## Bamboo Spears - Can be thrown like a trident. - Has seven tiers. - Deals a critical hit when thrown while sprinting in the air, which enables the spear to pierce through the target, and increases its throw distance and damage. - Can be enchanted with Loyalty, Piercing, Sharpness, Smite, Bane of Arthropods, Unbreaking, and Mending.
Tier Differences
Material Bamboo Stone Iron Copper Gold Diamond Netherite
Attack Damage 5 6 8 7 7 8 9
Attack Speed 1.6 1.4 1.1 1.4 1.2 1.3 1.1
Damage/Second (DPS) 8 8.4 8.8 9.8 8.4 10.4 9.9
Durability 100 200 400 350 100 1000 1500
Throw Distance 1.2 1.5 2.0 1.7 2.4 2.1 2.7
Entities that can be pierced 0 1 2 2 3 4 5
Burn Time (Ticks) 0 5 20 15 5 40 ∞
Special thanks to **[WAR MACHINE](https://youtube.com/channel/UCTMRVXJ0wbU0ka4I2z4cc9w)** for giving me the idea for this mod! (And for testing it) More places I took inspirations from: [Minecraft Feedback](https://feedback.minecraft.net/hc/en-us/community/posts/360028838292-Bamboo-Spears), [11CNM](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wCBSl-yU7t0), [u/UmbralChaos2000](https://www.reddit.com/r/minecraftsuggestions/comments/cxne2m/a_new_weapon_the_bamboo_spear/) *This is my first mod!*
